params.label: Store URL
params.description: This is the URL of your frontend store. We will be making calls via Shopware's Store API.

params.label: SalesChannel AccessToken
params.description: Navigate to your Shopware backend. Go to the desired Sales Channel. In the 'API access' section copy the 'API access key' here

params.label: Language ID
params.description: If not provided it will use the default language of the SalesChannel. Otherwise please go to admin backend, Settings > Languages > [Language you want]. Copy the ID in the website URL bar, e.g. http://example.com/.../detail/2fbb5fe2e29a4d70aa5854ce7ce3e20b

params.label: Registration URL path
params.description: Code will combine the Store URL + the provided path here

steps.description: Loads the user context to make sure we have a SW logged in context token
